zh.lifeSummary: Joan De Morton於1402年出生。她和William De Deighton至少有1個兒子。她去世於1456年9月享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan De Morton于1402年出生。她和William De Deighton至少有1个儿子。她去世于1456年9月享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

variants.name: Moreton
meanings: French: nickname from a double diminutive of   More   2 ‘Moor’. Compare   Moret  .

variants.name: Murton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places in northern England, all named in Old English as ‘settlement or enclosure at the marsh or moor’, from mōr ‘marsh, fen, moor’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. There has been considerable confusion with both Morton and Merton .

variants.name: Morten
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Joan De Morton was born in 1402. She had at least 1 son with William De Deighton. She died in September 1456, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan De Morton est née en 1402. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec William De Deighton. Elle est décédée en septembre 1456, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joan De Morton wurde 1402 geboren. Sie hatte mit William De Deighton mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb im September 1456 im Alter von 54 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Joan De Morton è nata il nel 1402. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con William De Deighton. Morì nel settembre 1456, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan De Mortonは1402年に生まれた。彼女はWilliam De Deightonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1456年9月に54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan De Morton(은)는 1402년 태어났다. 그녀는 William De Deighton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 9월 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan De Morton nasceu em 1402. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com William De Deighton. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1456, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan De Morton родилась в 1402 г. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от William De Deighton. Она умерла сентябрь 1456 г. в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Joan De Morton nació en 1402. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con William De Deighton. Murió en septiembre de 1456, a la edad de 54 años.
